howStep1Desc: Drop a PDF file or click to browse. Supports scanned PDFs, digital PDFs, and large documents up to 50MB.
howStep2Desc: Structured OCR recognizes text with layout awareness. DeepSeek AI processes complex document structures.

seoFaq.q1: How do I convert a PDF to text online for free?
seoFaq.a1: Upload your PDF to our free online PDF to text converter. The AI OCR automatically recognizes and extracts all text content while preserving the document layout. You can then edit and export the extracted text to Word, TXT, HTML, or Markdown.
seoFaq.q2: Can OCR extract text from a scanned PDF?
seoFaq.a2: Yes. Our AI-powered OCR is specifically designed to handle scanned PDFs and image-based documents. It recognizes text in multiple languages and preserves the original formatting wherever possible.
seoFaq.q3: What languages does the PDF to text converter support?
seoFaq.a3: It supports English, Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Greek, Italian, and more. The OCR engine automatically detects the document language for best recognition accuracy.
seoFaq.q4: Is the PDF to text conversion free?
seoFaq.a4: New users receive free credits to try the PDF to text OCR converter. Premium features include larger file sizes, batch processing, and priority processing speed.
seoFaq.q5: What file formats can I export after OCR?
seoFaq.a5: You can export the extracted text to TXT plain text, Microsoft Word (DOCX), HTML formatted text, or Markdown. Choose the format that best fits your workflow.
